user_query: My friends and I are planning a road trip across the United States. Can you recommend some must-visit landmarks and attractions along our route? Also, provide information about camping grounds and RV parks in each location. Lastly, suggest some popular local dishes and restaurants that we shouldn't miss.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of must-visit landmarks and attractions along the planned route across the United States.
Identify and gather information on camping grounds and RV parks near each landmark and attraction from the previous task.
required_inputs: landmarks and attractions list from task 1

TaskList.description: Find popular local dishes and restaurants in the vicinity of each landmark and attraction identified earlier.
required_inputs: landmarks and attractions list from task 1
